title: pelargonium × phaedimon
intro: Pelargonium × phaedimon, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and skin problems. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, boost mood, and support overall well-being.
